## What does this PR do?

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Docker / infrastructure
- [ ] CI / tooling
- [ ] Documentation

## Testing

- [ ] TypeScript type-check passes (`make typecheck`)
- [ ] ESLint passes (`make lint`)
- [ ] Tested locally with `pnpm dev` or `make dev`
- [ ] Docker image builds without errors (`make build`)

## Checklist

- [ ] No secrets or API keys committed
- [ ] `.env.example` updated if new env vars were added
- [ ] Commit messages follow the `type(scope): subject` convention
